content.text: JSSC JTGLCCE Recruitment 2026 : Get complete details about JSSC JTGLCCE Recruitment 2026, including recruitment updates, total vacancies, important dates, application fees, eligibility criteria, age limit, selection process, salary, syllabus, exam pattern, admit card, answer key, result, and more.

rows.text: Jharkhand Staff Selection Commission (JSSC) Jharkhand Technical / Specialized Graduate Level Combined Competitive Examination 2026 Advt. No. : 01/2026 Short Details of Notification
Notification Out : 07/05/2026 Starting Date : 01/06/2026 Last Date : 30/06/2026 11:59 PM Sign / Photo Upload : Upto 03/07/2026 Correction Date : 05-10 July 2026
Gen / OBC / EWS : 100/- SC / ST : 50/- Payment Mode : Online Mode
Age Limit : 21-35 Years Age Limit as on : 01/08/2026 The Age Relaxation Extra as per Rules.
Written Exam Medical Examination Document Verification

Assistant Insect Scientist : Post Graduation in Biological Science (Entomology). Assistant : Graduation Degree in Science. Inspector : Graduation Degree in Science. Block Statistical Supervisor/ JSA/ Investigator : Graduate Degree with Mathematics / Economics / Statistics. Dairy Technical Officer : Degree in Dairy Technology / Dairy Science or equivalent. Fishery Extension Supervisor : Graduate in Fishery Science or Zoology (Honours). Auditor : Graduate Degree in Mathematics / Economics / Commerce / Statistics. Junior Scientific Assistant : Graduate / Post Graduate qualification in Science, Pharmacy, or Pharmaceutical Chemistry with the Relevant Experience. Laboratory Assistant (Physics) : Graduate with Honours in Physics. Laboratory Assistant (Chemistry) : Graduate with Honours in Chemistry.

items: The Age Relaxation Extra as per Rules.
